name: Shamrock Weigh Station
description: State weigh and inspection station on I-40 near Shamrock on the approach from the Oklahoma line.

name: Midway Truck and Travel Center
description: Truck stop at the I-40 / US-83 junction in Shamrock with a Subway, trucker lounge, and a handful of truck parking spaces.

name: Country Corner
description: Independent truck stop / Texaco at I-40 Exit 142 in McLean offering fuel, a deli, convenience store, and tire and mechanical service.

name: Larry's Diesel Service
description: Diesel truck repair shop just off I-40 Exit 112 in Groom.

name: Love's Travel Stop #229
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-40 Exit 96 and Hwy 207 near Conway with diesel lanes, showers, and a Subway.

name: Flying J Travel Center #723
description: Full-service Flying J travel center on the east side of Amarillo with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, an on-site Denny's, and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Amarillo
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Flying J Travel Center on the east side of Amarillo at I-40 Exit 76.

name: Petro Amarillo (TravelCenters of America)
description: A large Petro/TA full-service travel center on the east side of Amarillo at the Lakeside Drive interchange offering diesel, dining, showers and truck repair.

name: TA Amarillo (TravelCenters of America)
description: A TravelCenters of America truck stop near the Whitaker Road interchange with fuel, a restaurant, showers and a truck service bay.

name: Love's Travel Stop #250
description: A Love's Travel Stop on the far west side of Amarillo near Bushland at I-40 Exit 60 with diesel lanes, a convenience store, showers, truck parking and a CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #200
description: A Love's Travel Stop on the east side of Amarillo offering diesel, fast food, showers and truck parking.

name: Toot'n Totum #99
description: A large independent Amarillo-based Toot'n Totum truck stop near the Lakeside Drive interchange with diesel lanes, showers, a truckers lounge and laundry.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Amarillo
description: A Blue Beacon commercial truck and trailer wash at the I-40 Whitaker Road exit offering exterior washes and trailer washouts.

name: Eagle Truck Wash
description: An independent truck wash located directly on the east I-40 frontage in Amarillo's Lakeside/Whitaker truck-stop corridor.

name: Southern Tire Mart #491
description: A commercial tire dealer on the east I-40 frontage offering truck tires and 24/7 roadside service for commercial vehicles.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop Amarillo (Exit 60)
description: A certified CAT Scale for weighing commercial trucks located at the Love's Travel Stop at the west Amarillo Exit 60.
